prestazioni: Replace the stock L74 400ci (6.6L) V8 with a forged rotating assembly from Eagle Specialty Products, featuring a 4.125" stroke crankshaft, H-beam connecting rods (6.800" length), and forged aluminum pistons (9.5:1 compression ratio) to handle 700+ HP reliably under boost

Install a custom-built single-turbo system using a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (88mm inducer, 1.15 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 4-into-1 stainless steel header from Stainless Works, paired with a Turbosmart Race Port 45mm wastegate and a Precision Turbo 50mm blow-off valve

Upgrade the fuel system with dual Aeromotive A1000 fuel pumps, ID1700x injectors, and a Holley Dominator ECU with a custom tune from Lund Racing, utilizing a 105mm MAF sensor and a custom 3.5" aluminum intake manifold with port-matched throttle body from Wilson Manifolds
estetica: Install a full carbon fiber widebody kit from RK Sport, including custom-fabricated front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a one-piece front bumper with integrated brake ducts, designed specifically for the 1969 Firebird chassis

Replace the stock interior with a full TMI Products custom upholstery package featuring Recaro SRD front seats (with 4-point harnesses), a custom rear seat delete with a full roll cage from Chassisworks (8-point, mild steel), and a custom aluminum dashboard with AutoMeter Pro-Comp Ultra-Lite gauges

Add a custom rear wing from APR Performance (GTC-300 model, 60" width, 3D carbon fiber construction) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals, paired with a custom front splitter from VIS Racing (carbon fiber, 3" overhang) and a custom hood from Harwood (5" cowl induction, fiberglass)
